since_last: 64% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.38%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.18% · BTC +0.73% · Gold +1.42% · Nasdaq100 +0.84%. 64% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.38%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.38%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.91%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.56%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.56%, KLAC +7.98%, AMAT +7.68%, LRCX +7.03%, SYNA +6.99%. Laggards: AVAV -6.23%, SOUN -5.96%, PLTR -5.28%, INOD -4.07%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.06% at $148.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.06% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
